mentions.role_in_text: Field of Action No. 3: Education, training, CPD and spin-offs
mentions.occurrence_sentence: 2.2.3  Field of Action No. 3: Education, training, CPD and spin-offs

Baden-Württemberg in the field of quantum technologies is an essential building block to achieve a sustainable quantum ecosystem and the first link in a successful value chain in quantum technologies.
The roadmaps aim to establish Baden-Württemberg as a leading technology and business hub in the national and international competition around quantum technology.
Besides photonics, Baden-Württemberg also currently boasts additional strengths and specialties in quantum computing;

role_in_text: provides a standardized format such as IBM's Qiskit software development kit
occurrence_sentence: Today's quantum computers are custom-built one-offs with a highly specific hardware component. At present, the control and programming of quantum processors of different types is not standardized. There are some attempts to create a standardized format such as IBM's Qiskit software development kit, but this has not yet found broad acceptance.

mentions.occurrence_sentence: QuantumBW is an initiative in which leading research institutions and enterprises in our state are joining forces to strategically develop Baden-Württemberg as a science and business hub for quantum technologies and to grow its international visibility as a quantum centre.
As part of the QuantumBW innovation initiative, we want to ensure that Baden-Württemberg continues to play a leading role in value creation with new quantum solutions.
As part of the QuantumBW innovation initiative, we want to ensure that Baden-Württemberg continues to play a leading role in value creation with new quantum solutions.

mentions.role_in_text: will create a framework designed to provide flexible support for pre-competition, application-oriented research projects and application-relevant proofs of concept
mentions.occurrence_sentence: To facilitate this, QuantumBW will create a framework designed to provide flexible support for pre-competition, application-oriented research projects and application-relevant proofs of concept for initial assessment of a technology's potential.

mentions.role_in_text: framework for pre-competition, application-oriented research projects and application-relevant proofs of concept
mentions.occurrence_sentence: To facilitate this, QuantumBW will create a framework designed to provide flexible support for pre-competition, application-oriented research projects and application-relevant proofs of concept for initial assessment of a technology's potential.

Within the framework of QuantumBW, models for shared, more efficient utilization of the existing building and equipment infrastructures available in the state are to be established on the basis of a comprehensive appraisal, and these infrastructures are to be specifically supplemented and expanded based on the technology roadmaps.

QuantumBW will therefore also establish itself as a platform for the coordinated development, promotion and retention of specialists for science and industry and develop concepts for the sustainable promotion of talent by interlinking excellent university teaching and business practice.
Within the organisational structure of QuantumBW, these roadmaps will be regularly reviewed and updated by the Executive Board, supported by the Advisory Board and the Head Office.

This critical aspect of quantum computer hardware is also considered in the roadmap developed by QuantumBW, without demanding the development of quantum communication be a part of Baden-Württemberg's remit.
